name: Amihan 2T
shortDesc: 2-stroke motorcycle oil for everyday commuters. Reliable engine protection in a compact size.
description: The Bagani Amihan 2T is a reliable 2-stroke motorcycle oil formulated for everyday commuters. Designed for the demands of Philippine roads, it provides consistent engine protection in a convenient 200ml size.
description2: Proudly made in the Philippines — Gawang Pilipino, Para sa Pilipino! — the Amihan 2T meets API TA standards for dependable 2-stroke engine performance.

features.title: Compact Size
features.desc: Convenient 200ml packaging perfect for single oil changes and on-the-go riders.

features.title: API TA Certified
features.desc: Meets API TA standards for reliable 2-stroke engine protection.

features.title: Clean Burn
features.desc: Formulated to minimize smoke and deposits for a cleaner ride.

features.title: Filipino-Made Quality
features.desc: Proudly manufactured in the Philippines for local riding conditions.

applications: Engines requiring API TA grade oil

faqs.q: How much Amihan 2T should I mix with gasoline?
faqs.a: Follow your motorcycle manufacturer's recommended fuel-to-oil ratio. Most 2-stroke motorcycles use a 40:1 or 50:1 ratio.

faqs.q: Can I use this in my automatic scooter?
faqs.a: If your scooter has a 2-stroke engine, yes. Most modern scooters are 4-stroke — check your owner's manual to confirm.

faqs.q: Where can I buy Bagani products?
faqs.a: Bagani oils are available at authorized motorcycle shops, auto parts stores, and online marketplaces across the Philippines. Contact us at info@baganioil.com to find the nearest dealer.
